sections.heading: Get Your 30-Min Custom Strategy Free
sections.description: We'll show you exactly where your ad budget is leaking, what's working, and your fastest path to 3x+ ROAS.

items.question: How fast will I see results?
items.answer: First ads in 5 days. Performance lift (20-40%) in 14 days. 2-3x ROAS by day 45-60. Results vary by category and current CAC.

items.question: What if I'm unhappy with the results in 90 days?
items.answer: You don't pay. Money-back guarantee if we don't hit 3x ROAS by day 90. No questions asked. (97% of clients stay and scale.)

items.question: Do you lock me into a contract?
items.answer: Nope. Start with a single 30-day sprint. After results hit, most clients scale 3-5x their spend. No lock-in, just results.
